chunks.title: The Enemy Approaches
chunks.reason: A unified oracle announcing the enemy's arrival due to covenant breach.

chunks.title: Rejection of Idols and Kings
chunks.reason: An argument detailing the rejection of human kings and idols with the metaphor of sowing wind.

chunks.title: Alliances and Sacrifices
chunks.reason: A speech describing Israel's reliance on Assyria and the futility of their sacrifices.

chunks.title: Judgment on Cities
chunks.reason: A concluding oracle pronouncing fire upon the cities of Israel and Judah.
